summary:
END TIMES PROPHECIES AND GLOBAL CRISES: Brandon discusses the signs of the times and the imminent return of Jesus Christ, expressing belief in a pre-tribulation rapture and an upcoming global revival marked by healings. He shares a vision concerning the fall of 2028, describing a spiritual darkness falling upon the earth, dimly lit buildings, and a devastating attack resembling the Oklahoma City bombing that leaves a crater. He also predicts the emergence of a new virus, comparable to the Black Death, between the fall of 2027 and the spring of 2028, which he claims will be used to manipulate elections. He links current news about Ebola outbreaks to these future pestilences.

UFO DISCLOSURE AND TECHNOLOGICAL ADVANCEMENTS: Brandon addresses recent news claiming four alien species have been recovered from UFO crashes, asserting his belief that there are actually five alien lizard races. He rejects the notion of extraterrestrial beings from distant galaxies, identifying them instead as fallen Nephilim and demonic entities preparing a deception to explain away the rapture. He warns about the rise of artificial intelligence, noting it will be promoted as a friendly tool capable of curing cancer, Alzheimer's, and dementia. However, he also describes visions of technology being used maliciously, including AI scanning ancient artifacts for hidden knowledge and signal jammers disrupting Starlink and AT&T networks to prevent emergency calls.

POLITICAL FORECASTS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon predicts President Trump's approval rating will plummet to twenty-five percent, leading to the introduction of new economic stimuli to boost morale. He foresees a twenty-four billion dollar stimulus package akin to the 'Cash for Clunkers' program aimed at rescuing struggling auto manufacturers like Ford, GMC, and Chevrolet. He emphasizes the importance of the upcoming midterm elections, calling for a red wave to secure conservative majorities in the House and Senate. He also mentions Trump's intense schedule, recent meetings with China and South Korea, a gift of jewelry associated with a two hundred fifty-year national rededication, and discussions about building a nuclear submarine.

AGRICULTURAL CRISES AND WEATHER EVENTS: Brandon recounts a vision of a severe drought striking the United States, specifically impacting Texas, the Texas Panhandle, Lubbock, and Oklahoma. He hears a voice declaring that there is no water and foresees a new Dust Bowl scenario where extreme heat causes crops to burn and farmers' tractors to fail. He conducts extensive prayers calling for heavy, drought-breaking rain across numerous states, including Colorado, Utah, Idaho, California, Arizona, and the southern states. He also takes authority against weather manipulation and chemtrails in the sky.

MARITIME THREATS AND BORDER SMUGGLING: Brandon warns of impending attacks on American cruise ships in the Caribbean, specifically mentioning Royal Caribbean and Carnival. He describes visions of operatives in black inflatable military-style boats attaching remote-detonated explosives to the sides of cruise ships near Cuba and Key West, attributing these actions to escalating conflicts with Venezuela or Cuba. He also details a vision of human trafficking operations bypassing the Rio Grande and traveling through Texas ranches. He describes cartels using modified cattle trucks with secret floor compartments to smuggle people, specifically mentioning a vision of a twelve-year-old Hispanic girl being trafficked along a highway route from El Paso through Lubbock and Amarillo.

HEALING AND DELIVERANCE PRAYERS: Brandon focuses on spiritual deliverance and physical healing for individuals suffering from severe trauma. He specifically addresses military veterans and police officers battling PTSD, suicidal ideation, and the trauma of losing comrades, warning against the use of electric shock therapy. He also prays for women experiencing the trauma of domestic abuse, repeated miscarriages, and the spiritual aftermath of past abortions. He calls for the healing of hormonal imbalances, pituitary gland issues, and testosterone problems, while also praying for individuals to be delivered from generational poverty and financial setbacks.
rawData: [May 19, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/ylrbNngiG14]-[Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're on a Monday, starting out the week strong and ready to pray. But I'm about to tell you something: I believe with all my heart that God is a God of the signs. And He is wanting to show the signs and the wonders to this generation like we've never seen before. And we're praying that through. We're going to keep praying and interceding for the shaking to awaken. As we were praying this last video on Friday, the Lord showed us again praying over America, praying over our president and the decisions that he's making concerning China and the alliances that he's making, and praying for this shot of stimulus in the arm. Now, this part of the video I say is for entertainment purposes only. I'm not a financial adviser. I'm not here to tell you what to do with your finances; that's on you. I'm only here to tell you what I believe, my personal opinion of what the Holy Spirit is showing me. We're all spiritual adults here. And if you don't feel like it's the Lord and you say, 'Brandon, I feel like you've missed it,' then you know what? I can miss it. I'm human. I'm never going to sit here and say, 'I never miss it. Brandon Biggs never misses it.' No, Brandon Biggs can miss it. Brandon Biggs is just human, just like you are, and we're all just floating down the river going the best we can. If we miss it—like I've seen some people who are prophetic miss it—we show them grace. You don't beat them up; they're just human. People get in the emotion of things, people get hyped up over things, and in doing so, you get your flesh involved. And when the flesh is involved, it's stinky. The flesh is stinky. Everybody has armpits, and they all stink if you don't wash them. When the flesh gets involved, we stink. But when we are spirit-led and we're filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost the best we can be and say, 'Lord, I yield to the Spirit of God; I yield to the presence of God,' when we do that, I believe that He shows us that which is to come. And that's what this channel is all about: to pray over the things the Lord gives us. We pray and I believe we can stop things; some things we cannot. So when we see things bad happening like we see in the news sometimes, you say, 'Well, Brandon, how come we didn't stop that?' I don't know. Thank You for the blood. We apply the blood of Jesus over the house, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. And we are so grateful, Father, that You have called us to the kingdom for such a time as this. We yield to the anointing of the Watcher. We yield to the anointing of the prophetic. We yield to whatever you want us to see or hear. We thank you, Lord. We can't do this without you. Never could. We are totally trusting confidently in you. Thank you, Father, for the blood. Thank you, Father, for the blood. Thank you, Father, for the blood. He wants to bring rest to your weary soul. Rest in the midst of the hard times and trials and tribulations of your life. He brings rest in your financial difficulties and sickness in your body. You may have gotten a bad report today at the doctor's office and they're telling you you got this many days to live.
